steps.t: Flowers are conveniently located outside the Festival Garden in the fields near Duillond. You should pick flowers to be replanted in the Festival Gard…
Flower pots are in the Festival Garden of Duillond. You should plant the flowers you collected in the flower pots.
Forlad is in the Festival Garden in Duillond. You should see if Forlad is satisfied with your work.
